title: proBAMsuite, a Bioinformatics Framework for Genome-Based Representation and Analysis of Proteomics Data.
author: Wang X Slebos RJ Chambers MC Tabb DL Liebler DC Zhang B
content: S-EPMC4813696 PMC4813696 proBAMsuite, a Bioinformatics Framework for Genome-Based Representation and Analysis of Proteomics Data.
